vocab.example: A bright yellow sports car will definitely catch the eye of every passerby on the street.

vocab.meaning: mỗi người một ý, tùy sở thích mỗi người
vocab.example: Some prefer flashy red while others like subtle grey; I guess it's a case of each to their own.

vocab.meaning: vấn đề về gu thẩm mỹ/sở thích
vocab.example: Whether a car should be matte or glossy is really just a matter of taste rather than functionality.

vocab.meaning: vẹn cả đôi đường (vừa đẹp vừa tiện)
vocab.example: Silver is great because it offers the best of both worlds: it looks sophisticated and hides dirt effectively.

vocab.word: in the eye of the beholder
vocab.meaning: tùy vào con mắt của người nhìn
vocab.example: The beauty of a lime green car is definitely in the eye of the beholder, as many might find it too garish.
Most people play it safe by choosing white or black to ensure they can sell the car easily later.

vocab.meaning: toát lên vẻ sang trọng, xa hoa
vocab.example: A deep champagne or metallic gold finish can really scream luxury and high social standing.

vocab.meaning: bất ngờ, khác biệt hoàn toàn
vocab.example: Choosing a neon purple car was a decision that came out of the blue, considering his usually conservative style.

vocab.meaning: một lựa chọn chắc chắn, ít rủi ro
vocab.example: For those worried about maintenance, a light grey car is always a safe bet.

vocab.meaning: bình dân, thực tế, không phô trương
vocab.example: I prefer dark brown or forest green because they feel more down to earth and less flashy than primary colors.
